description: A signed annotation of a prior encounter with a delayed finding. Retrospections address silent-error latency: merges, migrations, and bitemporal reconciliations often surface failures only after long delay.

main.description: Attribution and detection of a latent issue in a prior encounter. Causal claims are the publisher's judgment; disputes are themselves first-class records.

finding.description: Structured finding kind plus free-text detail.

latency.description: Detection latency in seconds (detectedAt - encounter.occurredAt). Precomputed for easy aggregation; may be omitted for 'other' findings where latency is not meaningful.

detectingParty.description: DID of the party that detected the issue.

confidence.description: Optional confidence score in [0, 1]. Omit when the finding is unambiguous.

disputedAttribution.description: True if the detecting party anticipates the causal attribution will be contested. A hint, not a fact; contest records are separate.

occurredAt.description: When this retrospection record was published.
